About Us

Giss Studio — Your Nail Space

Welcome to Giss Studio — your dedicated luxury space for manicure and pedicure. We specialize in nail art, acrylic nails, gel treatments, and full spa rituals for hands and feet. Every detail is crafted with precision and care.

Bienvenida a Giss Studio — tu espacio de lujo para manicure y pedicure de calidad. Nos especializamos en nail art, uñas acrílicas, gel y tratamientos de spa para manos y pies.

Services: Manicure · Pedicure · Gel · Acrylic · Nail Art
